title.en: The Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke.

content.en:
There are a lot of hidden supremes in the universe, so the arrival of Ye Tian's third deity did not cause other supremes to probe, at most it aroused the curiosity of some supremes.

Soon, a large number of Supremes gathered here, including those of the Twelve Universe Eras.

The Lord of the Ancient Age, the Golden Light Supreme, the Stone Dragon Supreme, and other Supremes arrived, their eyes staring at the black hole passage, and wisps of the rules of the different universes spread to this universe and merged with this universe.

"Who wants to go in?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke.

The Supremes looked left and right, and they didn't dare to step into it casually, after all, no one knew the situation over there, maybe the powerhouses of that universe were also watching.

"Let's use the avatar, the two universes are now colliding together, and some of the rules are fused, our avatar will not collapse immediately when it enters it, and it is suitable for exploration!"

One of the Supremes said.

As a result, one by one, the incarnations of the Supreme Condensation Strength were not weak and entered the Black Hole Channel, and the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others naturally condensed the incarnations into it.

Ye Tian was also curious about what the universe on the other side of the black hole looked like, so he also condensed an avatar and shuttled in.

......

Pitch black earth.

One by one, the incarnations of the Supreme came, and they immediately looked around blankly.

"Is this another universe?"

Many Supremes wondered.

But at this moment, a series of figures also appeared in the void in front of him, with human figures, beast shapes, and even the incarnations of supreme-level powerhouses in the shape of various monsters.

"It's the Supreme Incarnation of the Otherworld!"

The expressions of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others changed slightly.

In fact, as soon as the Lord of the Yuan Gu and some other powerful supremes entered here, they understood that this was not a different universe, but a space where the two universes collided and merged, and it was a space shared by the two universes.

For some reason, this space is very stable, and contains the rules of the two universes, and even more powerful rules are gradually being born.

It's a gem!

If they cultivated here, they could even hope to climb to a higher level.

The only pity is that this place has just been born, and the vitality is insufficient, so it is not suitable for cultivators with low cultivation to come in, and this space is not large, and it can't accommodate too many strong people.

"Are you the Supreme of the Otherworld?"

As a representative, the Lord of the Yuan Gu spoke.

I saw a supreme standing on the opposite side, even if it was just an incarnation, but the aura was very powerful, and even had the strength of an ordinary celestial venerable, the other party condensed and said: "Supreme? Is this the division of your universe to the earth venerable? Our universe continues to be divided in chaos, and we are the earth venerable powerhouses of the Cangyu universe." "

"Cangyu Universe!"

The Lord of Yuangu's face changed slightly.

What Cangyu Universe, he naturally hadn't heard of it, but the other party's universe actually had a name, and even used the realm division in Chaos, which showed that this Cangyu Universe knew chaos very well, and even was very powerful.

Otherwise, who would give a name to a universe and be recognized by everyone?

For example, in their universe, they don't get much Chaos Inheritance, and they don't know much about the cultivation of the Earth Venerable in the Chaos, how to divide their strength from the realm of the Earth Venerable, and if they really change their names, many forces may not necessarily recognize it.

"Cangyu Universe is not simple!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu Consciousness Dao.

"Guys in the Cangyu Universe, I don't know what your attitude is towards our universe?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked.

"Naturally, it's a friendly exchange!" The Supreme of the Cangyu Universe said with a smile: "We are all Earth Venerable powerhouses, and we are not far from transcendence, and our purpose is naturally to communicate with each other, combine the rules of the two universes to break the shackles, and thus transcend the universe." "

"That's nature!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu also said with a smile.

After the two chatted for a while, the supreme incarnations of the two universes could no longer be maintained, and they left one by one.

After coming back.

The expressions of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others were very unsightly, and it could be seen from the simple exchange that the strength of the other party's universe was very likely to be stronger than theirs, which was not a good thing.

"Lord of the Yuan Gu, do you think there will be a god-level powerhouse in the Cangyu Universe?"

The Golden Light Supreme frowned and asked.

"I don't know!" "The Lord of the Yuan Gu sighed: "The other party is very cautious and hasn't revealed too much, but it is very likely that there are god-level powerhouses, and our side does not have god-level powerhouses, if this is the case, they will invade on a large scale, and we may not be able to stop it!"

"It should be fine for the time being!" Golden Light Supreme said: "The rules of the two universes are only a preliminary fusion, if they enter our universe, they will definitely not be able to exert their full strength, so in a short period of time, they dare not enter our universe, at most send some weak people in!"

"Then what should we do? Send someone over too?" asked the Stone Dragon Supreme.

"Pie!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said, "If they send someone over, we will send someone over, otherwise we will not be able to understand the situation of the other party." If anyone against us dares to kill us, we will kill them. We must understand the situation, otherwise the situation will be very dangerous!Besides, at this time, the Cangyu Universe will not be one heart, even if we wait, is it one heart?"

The corners of Jinguang Supreme's mouth twitched, but he didn't refute.

Originally, they were just a temporary force, from the twelve cosmic epochs, and they had no friendship at all, and the era of the dual universe had come, and that great being probably wouldn't necessarily contact them.

It can be said that from now on, they are basically disbanded now, but they are just waiting and watching in order to face the powerhouses of the other universe.

If the other side is too powerful, he dares to guarantee that many supreme beings may take refuge in the other side!

As for whether the other side dares to ask for it, that's another matter.

------

"There should be a god-level powerhouse in the Cangyu universe!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He had chatted with Niu Ryu for a while, and he also had some understanding of the universe in chaos, a universe like theirs was relatively ordinary in chaos, and some powerful ordinary universes not only had god-level powerhouses, but even more than one three- or four-star god-level.

For example, Niu Ryu has learned about an ordinary universe, and there are several three-star gods in that universe, who are also anti-heaven, and the difficulty of the anti-heaven is many times easier than that of non-anti-heaven.

However, if it is not a rebel, it will be very difficult to improve the strength to a one-star god, Yuntan Tianjun is undoubtedly an accident, the other party must not only inherit the inheritance of the great existence of the chaotic god realm, but also inherit many other weak inheritances, and after a long time of almost a cosmic epoch, it finally reached the level of a three-star god general, and used the space-time heart seal to transcend.

It can be said that most of the god-level powerhouses are basically anti-heaven, and they are taking the road of anti-heaven.

The three-star god general level of the anti-heaven has a great deal of confidence in detachment, although it is an ordinary detachment, but as long as it is a detachment, once it enters the universe, the potential is very great, and the future is enough to become a strong party.

But several three- and four-star powerhouses in that universe did not choose to detach, and continued to improve their strength and accumulate their heritage.

There is not one, but many such universes.

It's just that the chaos is too big, and some small people will feel that there are very few transcendents, but judging from the great existence in the Chaos God Realm, transcendents are not rare.

For example, in a universe, several epochs give birth to a transcendent, and how many universes are chaotic?

The people of the Tibetan God Organization don't know, but Niu Ryu's insight is not shallow, and he knows a lot of the universe in chaos.

Some cultivation systems in the chaos are obviously prevalent in the Cangyu universe, and the cultivation system is stronger than their universe, and it is even possible that there are chaos powerhouses preaching, so it is not surprising that god-level powerhouses are born.

"Next should be the preliminary test of the two universes, this period is not dangerous, you can send some galaxy-level members of the Heavenly Pavilion and some geniuses of the human race into that universe, maybe you can get some opportunities. Once the temptation of the two universes is over, it will be a real fight!" Ye Tian sighed.

Time passed slowly, and the powerhouses of the two universes were preparing.

Ten years later, on this day.

Some galaxy-level and cosmic god-level Cangyu Universe cultivators have crossed the universe to learn and communicate.

The initial exchange between the two universes has begun!
